rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers in the same annex.
Validate that all AGREE expressions have valid types; resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by correcting root references or removing invalid clauses.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are declared or visible in the current scope to avoid resolution errors.
Use only scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE constant and equation declarations to prevent type resolution failures.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE code that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE reference errors; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about component type contracts
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
